name: pr-summary-writer
description: Write architecture-first pull-request descriptions: state the one structural idea directly, give the requirements the change had to satisfy, explain the why via before/after, cover only the load-bearing decisions, and name what deliberately did not change. Replaces changelog-style descriptions (file inventories, checkbox lists) with the mental model the diff assumes. Auto-invokes whenever a PR description is about to be written or revised.
